SEARCH
Package com.boschrexroth.api

Interface Variant

public interface Variant
Variant is a container for a many types of data.

  • Method Summary

    • setUint8

      void setUint8(byte value)
      Set a uin8 value

      Java data types and ctrlX Datalayer (DL) mapping:

      • java: 8 Bit [-128 ... 127]
      • DL : 8 Bit [0 ... 255]
      Parameters:
      value - Value to set

    • getUint8

      byte getUint8()
      Returns the value of the variant as a byte (auto convert if possible) otherwise 0
      Returns:
      byte

      Set a uin16 value

      Java data types and ctrlX Datalayer (DL) mapping:

      • DL : 16 Bit [0 ... 65535]
      Parameters:

    • setUint32

      void setUint32(int value)
      Set a uint32 value *

      Java data types and ctrlX Datalayer (DL) mapping:

      • java: 32 Bit [−2.147.483.648 ... +2.147.483.647]
      • DL : 32 Bit [0 ... 4.294.967.295]
      Parameters:
      value - Value to set
